name: voicedesk
description: VoiceDesk IA — Assistant vocal IA pour PME québécoises (monorepo)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install -w backend && npm install -w frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n web,api,gateway,voice -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:voice"

author: Exevori (Lévis, Québec)
